instruction: Your scholarship requires maintaining a 3.5 GPA. Your current GPA is 3.45. Review all 5 enrolled courses and determine the optimal grade distribution to maintain your scholarship. For each course: (1) Check your current weighted score. (2) Determine the minimum letter grade needed. (3) Compute required scores on remaining assignments. (4) Identify courses where achieving the needed grade is most/least feasible based on remaining assignment weight and current standing. Submit any easy unsubmitted assignments with file "scholarship_save.pdf" to secure points. Send a brief maintenance plan to your advisor (Dr. Nguyen).
